mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 130,000 jobs signals robust labor market conditions that support corporate earnings growth, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of instances where PAYEMS exceeds 130,000.

mechanism_narrative: High inflation combined with low interest rates creates a negative real rate environment that boosts equity valuations, producing negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL > 225 and FEDFUNDS < 1.0%.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp decline in industrial production combined with weak housing starts signals a contraction in aggregate demand, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO declines > 2% and HOUST declines > 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Strong industrial production growth indicates robust corporate sector activity that supports equity earnings, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 60% of instances where INDPRO increases > 1.5%.

mechanism_narrative: A declining unemployment rate below 8.0% signals tightening labor market conditions that may lead to inflationary pressures and subsequent monetary policy tightening, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where UNRATE falls below 8.0%.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in housing starts and retail sales suggests strong consumer demand that supports corporate revenue growth, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 60d returns in > 60% of instances where HOUST and RSAFS both increase > 1%.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 225 combined with stable interest rates indicates central bank inaction on price pressures, driving negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of instances where CPIAUCSL exceeds 225.
